tool.name: mark_as_false_positive
tool.description:
Persist a false-positive marker so future scans can recognize the pattern.
Called by the operator via panel UI when a finding is incorrect. Stores the fingerprint (vuln_type + normalized endpoint) in ~/.ziro/fp_memory.jsonl. Future scans check this memory and auto-downgrade matching findings.

parameter.name: reason
parameter.description: Why it's an FP — helps future investigation.

tool.name: check_fp_memory
tool.description: Check if a candidate finding was previously marked FP. Call BEFORE create_vulnerability_report to decide whether to suppress or proceed with a note.
